productDisplayName: Woodland Men  Olive Green Casual Shoes
description: Low-cut styling on the classic suede boot, this woodland shoe is set to become your mainstay while braving the great outdoors. Aggressive outsole with lugs, D-ring eyelets and tough overlays make this an adventurer's sartorialist dream. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo t-shirt. Upper Leather upper with strategically placed overlays Five-hole lace ups with D-ring metal eyelets Padded tongue Pull loop at the heel Padded insole for in-step comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Durable rubber midsole for cushioned comfort Outsole Dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and an upraised heel Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guard Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
